title: [Epic] Architectural Refactoring & Technical Debt Remediation (AICA & SDK)
body: This epic tracks refactoring tasks to address synchronous I/O, database lock contention, multi-tenant credential safety, precise token estimation, and DevOps pipeline hardening across AICA and the SDK.

issues.title: [Refactor] Migrate Synchronous Schema Reads to Async Caching
issues.body: Optimize AIService JSON schema compilation by removing synchronous filesystem calls inside the asynchronous validation path.

issues.title: [Performance] Decouple SQLite Persistence with Async Worker Thread Offloading
issues.body: Prevent main thread blockages by offloading synchronous better-sqlite3 writes from the SDK's PersistenceService.

issues.title: [Security] Refactor Multi-Tenant Credential Scoping in AI Provider Instances
issues.body: Harden AI provider caching registry to securely isolate tenant API keys and prevent memory fragmentation.

issues.title: [Refactor] Integrate tiktoken-node for Precise Pre-Flight Token Guardrails
issues.body: Replace heuristic-based token estimator with exact BPE tokenizer checks to protect API quotas.

issues.title: [DevOps] Eliminate Global State Pollution and Hardcoded Ports in E2E Pipeline
issues.body: Refactor E2E script run-e2e-ldm.sh to support dynamic port discovery and prevent global developer configuration modifications.
